serverUrl.title: ZoneMinder Server URL
serverUrl.description: Base URL of the ZoneMinder server (e.g. https://zm.example.com)

profileName.title: Profile Name
profileName.description: Display name for the auto-created profile (default: Managed Profile)

kioskMode.title: Enable Kiosk Lock
kioskMode.description: Automatically lock the app into kiosk mode on startup

kioskPin.title: Kiosk PIN
kioskPin.description: PIN to unlock kiosk mode (4-8 digits)

kioskNavigationLock.title: Lock Navigation
kioskNavigationLock.description: Restrict navigation to the default page only when kiosk is locked

allowSelfSignedCerts.title: Allow Self-Signed Certificates
allowSelfSignedCerts.description: Accept self-signed HTTPS certificates from the ZoneMinder server

montageGridRows.title: Montage Grid Rows
montageGridRows.description: Number of rows in the montage grid

montageGridCols.title: Montage Grid Columns
montageGridCols.description: Number of columns in the montage grid

montageFeedFit.title: Montage Feed Fit
montageFeedFit.description: How camera feeds fit within their grid cells

montageShowToolbar.title: Show Montage Toolbar
montageShowToolbar.description: Show the toolbar row on the montage page

snapshotRefreshInterval.title: Snapshot Refresh Interval
snapshotRefreshInterval.description: Seconds between snapshot refreshes (when using snapshot view mode)

streamMaxFps.title: Stream Max FPS
streamMaxFps.description: Maximum frames per second for live streams

selectedGroupId.title: Monitor Group ID
selectedGroupId.description: Only show monitors from this group (leave empty for all)
